cards.back: A game where one player's gain is equal to another player's loss, with perfect information
A game where the order of play is sequential, with perfect information and complete knowledge of the game's history
A situation where all players have complete knowledge of the game's state and the actions of other players
A situation where all players have complete knowledge of the game's state, the actions of other players, and the game's rules
A tree diagram representing all possible moves and their outcomes in an extensive game with perfect information
